name: productflow-sso-config-hardening
title: ProductFlow SSO Config Page Hardening - Toggle, Status, Test, Audit, i18n
description: Mid-scope (B-tier) hardening of the new-api ProductFlow SSO admin configuration page surfaced by the 2026-05-23 grill-me design session. Adds the missing enable/disable toggle, top status card, test-connection probe, callback URL preview, TTL helper, secret strength meter + confirmation dialog, batch save with atomic audit, base_url tri-level warning, full zh/en i18n (with sync fallback for fr/ja/ru/vi), system-side SSO lifecycle audit logging, and a generic manage-diff detail dialog renderer. ProductFlow co-changes are limited to a single rate-limited health probe endpoint.
creator: name
notes: Sibling task to productflow-sso-followups. Phase 0 (P0 bug fix + zh/en i18n) is independently releasable. The ProductFlow-side health probe endpoint in Phase 2 is owned by this task as a cross-repo deliverable (no sibling ProductFlow task currently exists with backend-route scope; auth-ui-flow explicitly excludes backend changes per its PRD line 47). Spec updates in Phase 5 lock the cross-service contracts surfaced by this task.
